title: Backroads
lyrics: Wondering down in my bones Every time a little twist echoes A laughter whispers of more dreams They're in my rear view Wandering down these back roads Memories linger like a ghost Every turn a twist A reminder of what I miss the most Echoes of laughter, whispers of old dreams In the rear view mirror they're not as close as they seem Regrets a heavy load, a burden on my soul Every step I've taken, every path I've chose Regrets a heavy load, and a burden on my soul On these back roads of regret I'm searching for a sign A way to turn back time to the days when you were mine But the miles stretch out ahead There's no going back to where we've been Lost in this maze of memories I just keep being haunted by what we could've been So the sun sets behind me, casting shadows on the road Fading like the yesterdays, the stories left untold As each mile marker passes Like pages in a book of chapter closed I need every second look to tell me if I was right If you were wrong As each mile marker passes Like pages in a book of chapter closed Forever Regrets a haunting tune, a melody of pain Echoing in sounds, driving me insane On these back roads of regret I'm searching for a sign I've traveled down these roads with a heavy heart to bear Regretting every moment, wishing you were here I've traveled down these roads with a heavy heart to bear Wishing you were here Regretting every moment that leads me further away from where we were And what we needed to be Cause on these back roads of regret I'm searching for a sign A way to turn back time to the days when you were mine But the miles stretch out ahead There's no going back But the miles stretch out ahead There's no going back

lyricsSegments.text: Wondering down in my bones
Every time a little twist echoes
A laughter whispers of more dreams
They're in my rear view
Wandering down these back roads
Memories linger like a ghost
Every turn a twist
A reminder of what I miss the most
Echoes of laughter, whispers of old dreams
In the rear view mirror they're not as close as they seem
Regrets a heavy load, a burden on my soul
Every step I've taken, every path I've chose
Regrets a heavy load, and a burden on my soul
On these back roads of regret
I'm searching for a sign
A way to turn back time to the days when you were mine
But the miles stretch out ahead
There's no going back to where we've been
Lost in this maze of memories
I just keep being haunted by what we could've been
So the sun sets behind me, casting shadows on the road
Fading like the yesterdays, the stories left untold
As each mile marker passes
Like pages in a book of chapter closed
I need every second look to tell me if I was right
If you were wrong
As each mile marker passes
Like pages in a book of chapter closed
Forever
Regrets a haunting tune, a melody of pain
Echoing in sounds, driving me insane
On these back roads of regret
I'm searching for a sign
I've traveled down these roads with a heavy heart to bear
Regretting every moment, wishing you were here
I've traveled down these roads with a heavy heart to bear
Wishing you were here
Regretting every moment that leads me further away from where we were
And what we needed to be
Cause on these back roads of regret
I'm searching for a sign
A way to turn back time to the days when you were mine
But the miles stretch out ahead
There's no going back
But the miles stretch out ahead
There's no going back
